debug_info.goal:
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q r : NNReal
hr₀ : some r ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) (some r)
hp₀ : p ≠ 0
⊢ q ≠ 0

proof:
by
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    by_contra hq
    simp [hq] at h
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.mp h.symm)
failed_attempts:
by
    rintro rfl
    have := ENNReal.HolderTriple.def
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at this
    exact hr₀ this
fun h ↦ hr₀ <| ENNReal.inv_eq_top.1 <| by simp [h, hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm]

by
    intro h
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    rw [h, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at this
    exact ENNReal.inv_ne_top.2 hr₀ this.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    apply hr₀
    simpa using hpqr.inv_sum.symm

by
    intro rfl
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at h
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at hr₀
    exact hr₀ h.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at h
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.1 h.symm)

by
    intro h
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    rw [h, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at this
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.mp this.symm)

by
    intro rfl
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    rintro rfl
    simp [ENNReal.HolderTriple] at hpqr
    exact hr₀ hpqr

by
    intro rfl
    simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at hpqr
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.1 hpqr.symm)

by
    rintro rfl
    rcases hpqr with ⟨h⟩
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at h
    exact hr₀ (by simpa using h.symm)

by
    intro h
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp only [h, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at this
    rw [ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero] at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    by_contra rfl
    apply hr₀
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ← hpqr.inv_add_inv]
    simp

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp [ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    intro rfl
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    simpa [hr₀] using h

by
    rintro rfl
    have := ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at this
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.mp this.symm)

by
    intro h
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    rw [h, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at this
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.1 this.symm)

by
    intro rfl
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    intro h
    simpa [h, hr₀, ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at hpqr
    exact (ENNReal.inv_ne_top.2 hr₀).ne hpqr.symm

by
    intro h
    simpa [h, ENNReal.inv_eq_top, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    by_contra h
    apply hr₀
    simpa [h, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm

by
    intro hq
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp only [hq, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top] at this
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.mp this.symm)

by
    intro h
    simpa [h, ENNReal.inv_eq_top, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm

by
    intro rfl
    apply hr₀
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ← ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.coe_zero,
      ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.add_top]

by
    by_contra hq
    apply hr₀
    simpa [hq] using hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    apply hr₀
    simpa [ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [ENNReal.add_top] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    intro h
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp [h, ENNReal.coe_inv hr₀] at this

by
    intro h
    simpa [h, ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm
successful_attempts:
by
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    by_contra hq
    simp [hq] at h
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.mp h.symm)
